nasb.text: For thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, “Houses and fields and vineyards will again be bought in this land.” ’

esv.text: For thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: Houses and fields and vineyards shall again be bought in this land.’

cnv.text: 因為萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：將來在這地必再有人買房屋、田地和葡萄園。’

ccb.text: 因为以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说，将来必有人在这里重新买房屋、田地和葡萄园。”
